title: Block invalid overlay combinations with PlayTFGif
description:
Feature: Block invalid overlay combinations with PlayTFGif
Scenario: Overlay is rejected after native GIF playback
Given a PlayTFGif playback context
When send_text_overlay is called
Then a clear ValueError is raised and no Draw/SendHttpText command is sent

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented compatibility guard: overlay attempts after PlayTFGif now raise clear ValueError.
